2210170.name: Lila's Tale and The Hidden Forest Soundtrack
2210170.description:
The Lila's Tale Soundtrack is heavily inspired in nintendo and fantasy adventure games. Orchestral music with a lot of percussion, melodies and big basses.

Lila's Tale is a cute and nice game. The game has amazing musics that you can buy now! There are a lot of musics to choose from, and you'll have a great time playing Lila's Tale over and over again!
